topic.name: 科技、能源与产业
topic.description: 关注人工智能、芯片、太空、能源转型与关键产业
topic.query: technology artificial intelligence semiconductor energy industry

overview: 今日专题“科技、能源与产业”。共筛选 23 个高价值事件，重点关注中国相关进展、美国相关进展及全球外交、经济与安全动态。

items.title: China won’t waste its reserves to cushion oil price impact of Iran war
items.summary: Oil prices are set to rise once more as renewed US attacks on Iran leave the Strait of Hormuz, a major artery of oil trade, closed again. With US strategic petroleum reserves at their lowest in over 40 years, America will have trouble keeping oil prices below US$100 a barrel, as it has mostly done in the war so far. Analysts warn that sustained oil prices above US$100 risk accelerating inflation, depressing consumption and inviting recession. They have also turned their attention to China and...
items.titleZh: 中国不会动用储备来缓冲伊朗战争对油价的影响
items.summaryZh: 随着美伊冲突导致霍尔木兹海峡再次关闭，全球油价面临上涨压力。分析指出，中国不太可能通过消耗战略储备来平抑油价波动。
items.whyImportant: 中国在能源市场上的应对策略将对全球油价走势产生重要影响。

items.title: US launches further strikes on Iran; Houthis threaten Saudi shipping blockade – Middle East crisis live
items.summary: US says latest attack aimed at further degrading Iranian military capabilities; Yemen militant group threatens traffic moving through Bab el-Mandeb strait US launches 10th round of strikes as Iran says it is in ‘full-scale war’ The price of oil jumped in early Asian trade on Monday after the US carried out its latest wave of strikes on Iran and a vessel caught fire in the strait of Hormuz. Brent crude for September delivery rose 2.72% to $90.50 a barrel by around 0100 GMT, after briefly crossing $91 – its highest price since June. CENTCOM assets targeted Iranian military command centers, air defense and coastal surveillance sites, maritime capabilities, missile and drone launch sites, and communications networks to further diminish Iran’s ability to attack commercial vessels and civilian mariners transiting the Strait of Hormuz. The U.S. military is holding Iran accountable at the Commander in Chief’s direction. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 美国对伊朗发动进一步袭击；胡塞武装威胁封锁沙特航运——中东危机直播
items.summaryZh: 美军持续打击伊朗军事目标，胡塞武装则威胁封锁红海航道。地区冲突升级导致国际油价显著上涨。
items.whyImportant: 中东地区冲突的蔓延对全球航运和能源安全构成了严峻挑战。

items.title: Trump exploring additional tariffs on Canada for wildfire smoke impacts in US, White House official says –as it happened
items.summary: This live blog is now closed. Donald Trump to impose 50% tariff on most Canadian goods, White House says Sign up for the Breaking News US email While speaking to reporters on Sunday, Donald Trump acknowledged the three US military casualties as the strikes on Iran continue unabated. “Well, we feel very badly, but you know those great people, those great patriots, were out there fighting that Iran cannot have a nuclear weapon,” Trump said while returning to Washington from the Fifa World Cup final in New Jersey. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 白宫官员称，特朗普正在考虑对加拿大征收额外关税，以应对野火烟雾对美国的影响
items.summaryZh: 特朗普政府计划对加拿大商品征收50%的关税，理由包括贸易歧视及环境影响。此举引发了美加双边关系的紧张。
items.whyImportant: 将环境问题与贸易关税挂钩是特朗普政府政策的新动向，可能引发连锁贸易反应。

items.title: Brazil widens lead in China’s soybean market as US shipments fall despite Trump-Xi deal
items.summary: China imported 12.08 million tonnes of Brazilian soybeans in June, up 13.7 per cent from a year earlier, while volumes from the United States fell 20.6 per cent to 1.27 million tonnes, far off the pace implied by the purchasing deal agreed by Presidents Donald Trump and Xi Jinping, according to figures released on Monday by China’s General Administration of Customs. Total arrivals of the oilseed reached 13.55 million tonnes, a record for the month, lifted by Brazilian supply and by the clearing...
items.titleZh: 尽管有特朗普与习近平的协议，美国大豆出口下降，巴西扩大在华市场份额
items.summaryZh: 中国海关数据显示，巴西大豆进口量大幅增长，而美国大豆进口量则出现下滑。这表明美中贸易协议的执行情况与预期存在差距。
items.whyImportant: 大豆贸易数据的变化反映了美中贸易关系的复杂性及全球农产品市场的竞争格局。

items.title: ‘Front groups and fellow travelers’: state department attacks US left over Cuba
items.summary: New report denounces Havana and claims ‘campaign of subversion’ has infiltrated highest levels of US government As part of the Trump administration’s continuing attack on left-leaning groups, the US state department has listed several activists and organizations as “front groups and fellow travelers” for Cuba, including Hasan Piker and Amazon Labor Union founder Chris Smalls. In a 100-page report released on Monday, the state department denounces Cuba as the “capital of 21st-century communism”, accusing the Cuban government of carrying out a “campaign of subversion” that has “infiltrated the highest reaches of the US government, recruited and cultivated generations of American activists [and] backed an unprecedented wave of leftwing terrorism on American soil”. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: “前线组织和同路人”：美国国务院攻击美国左翼与古巴的关系
items.summaryZh: 美国国务院发布报告，指责古巴对美国进行“颠覆活动”，并将部分左翼活动人士列为古巴的“同路人”。此举被视为特朗普政府对国内政治对手的打压。
items.whyImportant: 该报告反映了美国国内政治极化以及政府对意识形态对手的强硬立场。

items.title: Australia news live: Pauline Hanson says Trump had ‘a great way’ of dealing with migrants; Nine newspapers announce redundancies
items.summary: One Nation leader says Trump’s methods dealt with people ‘using all these ploys to stay in the country’. Follow today’s news live Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast Alpine ski resorts in New South Wales and Victoria saw climate records shattered at the weekend with maximum temperatures up to 12C above average. Ski areas of Mount Hotham and Falls Creek set July records for their hottest daytime and night-time temperatures and Thredbo also set a new hottest July day, according to the Bureau of Meteorology. We want to see more Australian ideas commercialised, more Australian technology deployed globally, and more of the economic value harnessed here at home. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 澳大利亚新闻直播：宝琳·汉森称特朗普处理移民的方式“很棒”；九号报业宣布裁员
items.summaryZh: 一族党领袖汉森称赞特朗普应对移民的手段有效。与此同时，澳大利亚部分滑雪胜地气温打破历史纪录，极端高温引发关注。
items.whyImportant: 该报道反映了澳大利亚政坛对移民政策的争议以及气候变化对当地旅游业的直接影响。

items.title: Donald Trump to impose 50% tariff on most Canadian goods, White House says
items.summary: Turmoil likely as Trump officials say Canada unfairly discriminated against US autos, alcohol and dairy products Donald Trump is imposing 50% tariffs on most Canadian goods in response to the country retaliating against previous US tariffs, the White House announced Monday, declaring Canada has unfairly discriminated against American cars, alcohol and dairy products. The tariffs will hit a wide range of products, the White House said, including wine, hockey sticks and cement. They also include goods previously protected from import taxes under the United States-Mexico-Canada (USMCA) agreement. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 白宫称特朗普将对大多数加拿大商品征收50%的关税
items.summaryZh: 特朗普政府宣布对加拿大商品征收高额关税，以报复加拿大对美国产品的歧视性政策。此举预计将对美加贸易产生重大冲击。
items.whyImportant: 美加贸易战的升级将对北美经济一体化造成严重破坏。

items.title: How will Zelenskyy handle the growing political crisis at home?
items.summary: Ukraine strikes Russian oil sites after major missile attack, as President Zelenskyy faces crisis over sacked minister.
items.titleZh: 泽连斯基将如何处理国内日益严重的政治危机？
items.summaryZh: 在乌克兰对俄罗斯石油设施发动袭击后，泽连斯基政府面临部长被解职引发的内部政治危机。乌克兰正处于应对外部军事压力与内部政治动荡的双重挑战中。
items.whyImportant: 乌克兰的内部政治稳定直接影响其在俄乌冲突中的应对能力。

items.title: ‘It needs to end now’: Democrats urge Trump to halt Iran war after US troop deaths
items.summary: President accused of having ‘lost control of this war’ as deaths of trio in Iranian military strikes fuel rising concern Democrats have seized on the deaths of three US troops killed in Iranian strikes to urge Donald Trump to urgently reverse his resumption of the war with Iran amid widespread anxiety over climbing casualties. Even as US forces launched a 10th consecutive wave of attacks against Iranian targets, concern over the deaths of American service personnel threatened to complicate moves to escalate the conflict, which has reignited after he last week walked away from a memorandum of understanding agreed with Iran in June. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: “必须立即停止”：民主党人敦促特朗普在美军死亡后停止对伊战争
items.summaryZh: 随着三名美军在伊朗袭击中丧生，民主党人指责特朗普失去对战争的控制。尽管美军持续发动反击，但不断攀升的伤亡人数加剧了国内对冲突升级的担忧。
items.whyImportant: 美军伤亡事件加剧了美国国内政治分歧，并使美伊冲突的走向变得更加复杂。

items.title: US launches fresh strikes on Iran, as Trump warns of retaliation for deaths of soldiers
items.summary: The US says the attacks were aimed at degrading Iran's capabilities to attack ships in the Strait of Hormuz.
items.titleZh: 美国对伊朗发动新一轮袭击，特朗普警告将为士兵死亡进行报复
items.summaryZh: 美国表示，此次袭击旨在削弱伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡攻击船只的能力。特朗普政府誓言要对美军士兵的死亡采取报复行动。
items.whyImportant: 美伊军事对抗升级，直接威胁到全球能源运输要道霍尔木兹海峡的安全。

items.title: Chinese teenager lies to parents about holiday to secretly help flood victims in Guangxi
items.summary: A teenager from eastern China told his parents he was going on holiday, but secretly travelled with a friend to a flood-stricken region to join relief efforts. Earlier this month, 18-year-old Shanghai student Wu Yulun had just completed the gaokao, China’s national college entrance examination, and was planning a graduation trip. But after seeing an online appeal from a volunteer group in the southwestern Guangxi region, he abandoned those plans and headed for the disaster zone instead. Days of...
items.titleZh: 中国少年谎称度假，实则秘密前往广西支援洪灾救援
items.summaryZh: 一名刚参加完高考的上海学生瞒着父母，前往广西洪灾区参与志愿服务。他的善举在网上引发关注，展现了年轻一代的社会责任感。
items.whyImportant: 该事件体现了中国青年在面对自然灾害时的积极参与精神。

items.title: Hong Kong’s first-time lawmakers ask fewer questions but attend Legco more often
items.summary: Hong Kong’s first-time lawmakers have raised fewer questions than their veteran counterparts but recorded a higher attendance rate, a South China Morning Post check has found. Alan Chan Chung-yee, who is also the chief operating officer of Miramar Group, and athlete turned legislator Vivian Kong Man-wai were among those who submitted the fewest questions to the government. Political observers attributed the trend to newcomers seeking to balance respect for the executive-led system with their...
items.titleZh: 香港新任议员提问减少但出席率更高
items.summaryZh: 调查显示，香港新任立法会议员在议会中的提问频率低于资深议员，但出席率表现更佳。分析认为这反映了新人试图在行政主导体制下寻求平衡。
items.whyImportant: 这一趋势反映了香港立法会新老议员在履职风格上的差异及政治生态的变化。

items.title: Russian attack on Odesa kills three after Ukraine targets Moscow with drones overnight – as it happened
items.summary: Moscow targets southern city after the Russian capital was hit by 400 drones in response to one of the war’s biggest attacks on Kyiv at the weekend There is also a bit more from Reuters on the context – and the significance – of these continued strikes on ships: “Both Russia and Ukraine are major grain exporters, and ​the renewed violence on this route has ​raised concerns about supply. Ukraine, which in recent ​seasons accounted for about 6% of global wheat exports and about 11% of global corn ​exports, has lost about a ‌third of its capacity ​to export grain via ​its Black Sea ports due to Russian missile and drone attacks, traders and analysts have said. “Upon prime minister @KoretskyiUA’s instructions, @MFA_Ukraine is already informing the International Maritime Organization and our international partners about Russia’s latest attacks on civilian shipping, as well as the governments of the states whose citizens were killed or injured. During president @ZelenskyyUa‘s recent visit to London, I discussed this issue with the IMO leadership and called for the deployment of an international monitoring mission to Ukraine’s ports. We expect this mission to begin its work as planned in
items.titleZh: 俄罗斯袭击敖德萨致三人死亡，此前乌克兰连夜用无人机袭击莫斯科
items.summaryZh: 俄乌双方近期爆发大规模相互袭击，导致平民伤亡及基础设施受损。冲突升级引发了国际社会对全球粮食供应安全的担忧。
items.whyImportant: 俄乌冲突的持续升级不仅造成严重人道主义后果，还对全球粮食供应链构成威胁。

items.title: Can Europe win a trade war with China? It may depend on how victory is defined
items.summary: As trade tensions with China reach boiling point, EU officials are ramping up engagement with Beijing in search of an off-ramp. Quietly behind the scenes, though, Europe is preparing for a trade war. In Brussels, a steely determination has set in to ensure the bloc’s manufacturing heartlands are not deindustrialised by the “China Shock 2.0”. With some industries already haemorrhaging jobs, the EU’s resilience-building and de-risking plans are now laced with deterrents as Brussels looks to...
items.titleZh: 欧洲能赢得与中国的贸易战吗？这可能取决于如何定义胜利
items.summaryZh: 欧盟在寻求与中国接触的同时，也在为潜在的贸易战做准备。布鲁塞尔致力于保护制造业免受“中国冲击”，并加强经济韧性。
items.whyImportant: 中欧贸易关系的紧张态势对全球经济格局及双方产业发展具有深远影响。

items.title: Pauline Hanson shares Seven pitch for Spotlight special that says program would highlight ‘uncontrolled immigration’
items.summary: One Nation leader posts network’s proposal to travel to UK to explore what Australia faces ‘if we don’t take back control of who comes to our country’ Follow our Australia news live blog for latest updates Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast A Seven producer urged Pauline Hanson to travel to Britain to meet Nigel Farage and film a Spotlight special highlighting so-called “uncontrolled immigration”, according to a pitch posted to social media by the One Nation leader. The pitch also suggested that Seven might cover some of the travel costs for the One Nation leader and her team and that the program wanted the Reform UK leader to “invite Ms Hanson to Britain”. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 宝琳·汉森分享七号台节目提案，称将重点报道“不受控制的移民”
items.summaryZh: 一族党领袖汉森公开了一份节目提案，显示七号台曾邀请她前往英国探讨移民问题。此举引发了关于媒体中立性及政治议程设置的讨论。
items.whyImportant: 该事件揭示了澳大利亚媒体与政治人物在移民议题上的互动及其对公众舆论的影响。

items.title: Iran war live: Tehran attacks Gulf states, says 2 tankers in Hormuz on fire
items.summary: Explosions reported in Iran's Bandar Abbas, Qeshm Island, Chabahar and Konarak as US launches new wave of attacks.
items.titleZh: 伊朗战争直播：德黑兰袭击海湾国家，称霍尔木兹海峡两艘油轮起火
items.summaryZh: 伊朗多地发生爆炸，同时美军发动新一轮袭击。霍尔木兹海峡局势急剧恶化，油轮受袭引发市场恐慌。
items.whyImportant: 霍尔木兹海峡的动荡直接冲击全球能源市场，加剧了地区战争风险。

items.title: Trump order targets China-linked military mineral supply chains
items.summary: US President Donald Trump on Monday signed an executive order aimed at reducing dependence on China for defence-related critical minerals, directing military contractors to shift away from Beijing-linked supply chains beginning in January 2027. Without naming China, Trump’s executive order stresses the need to maintain US military dominance “in an era of renewed great power competition”. “The United States must secure its supply chains against physical, cyber, and economic subversion,” it...
items.titleZh: 特朗普签署行政令，针对与中国有关的军事矿产供应链
items.summaryZh: 特朗普签署行政令，要求国防承包商在2027年1月前减少对中国关键矿产的依赖。此举旨在确保美国在军事竞争中的供应链安全。
items.whyImportant: 美国在关键矿产领域的“去中国化”政策将重塑全球国防工业供应链。

items.title: US claims 3 China-linked spy sites in Cuba monitoring American military activity
items.summary: The United States has accused China of operating three intelligence-gathering facilities in Cuba and sharply expanding its personnel on the island, portraying Havana as a strategic platform for Beijing to monitor American military activity. A State Department report released on Monday said China maintained a “persistent intelligence-gathering presence” in Cuba, whose location gives Beijing potential access to electronic communications, military installations and maritime activity in the...
items.titleZh: 美国声称中国在古巴设有三个间谍站点，用于监控美军活动
items.summaryZh: 美国国务院发布报告，指责中国在古巴运营情报设施并扩大人员规模。美方认为这构成了对美国国家安全的潜在威胁。
items.whyImportant: 美中在情报领域的相互指责加剧了双边关系的紧张程度。

items.title: Chinese robot makers’ lament: if we only had a better ‘brain’, and more data
items.summary: Chinese robotics companies lack both sufficient data and a good “brain” to improve the interaction of their products with the physical world, according to industry insiders at the World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC), which concluded on Monday in Shanghai. The most critical challenge for the embodied AI industry was to “link hardware, data, models and real-world scenarios into a closed-loop iterative system”, said Wang Xiaogang, co-founder of SenseTime and chairman of its robotics...
items.titleZh: 中国机器人制造商的感叹：如果能有更好的“大脑”和更多数据就好了
items.summaryZh: 行业专家指出，中国机器人企业在数据积累和人工智能算法方面仍面临挑战。实现硬件与模型的闭环迭代是行业发展的关键瓶颈。
items.whyImportant: 中国机器人产业在核心技术上的突破能力将决定其在全球市场的竞争力。

items.title: US attacks Iran for 10th consecutive night
items.summary: Washington vows revenge for US military casualties, while Iran claims attacks on US sites across the region.
items.titleZh: 美国连续第10晚袭击伊朗
items.summaryZh: 华盛顿誓言为美军伤亡复仇，而伊朗则声称对该地区的美国设施进行了反击。双方军事对抗进入白热化阶段。
items.whyImportant: 持续的军事打击增加了中东地区爆发全面战争的风险。

items.title: US Justice Department investigating Harvard over financial aid programmes
items.summary: The US Department of Justice said on Monday it launched a probe reviewing whether some Harvard University financial aid programmes were discriminatory, marking the latest fight against ‌the university by President Donald Trump’s administration. “The Justice Department’s Civil Rights Division announced today it is opening a compliance review into Harvard University to determine whether its China-based financial aid programmes and practices exclude American-citizen students,” the department said...
items.titleZh: 美国司法部调查哈佛大学的经济援助项目
items.summaryZh: 美国司法部启动调查，审查哈佛大学的经济援助项目是否存在歧视行为。重点在于这些项目是否排斥了美国公民学生。
items.whyImportant: 此举是特朗普政府对高等教育机构进行意识形态审查的一部分。

items.title: Healey made chancellor, Miliband named foreign secretary and Yvette Cooper becomes health secretary as Burnham picks cabinet – UK politics as it happened
items.summary: Rayner is back as housing secretary, while Mahmood and McFadden remain in their existing posts Burnham vows his arrival in power will be ‘circuit breaker’ moment for UK Six highlights from Andy Burnham’s first Downing Street speech Andy Burnham may see banners urging the government not to allow the proposed Rosebank oil field development in the North Sea as he drives to Buckingham Palace and the No 10 today. Here is a banner on Whitehall. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 希利出任财政大臣，米利班德被任命为外交大臣，伊薇特·库珀成为卫生大臣，伯纳姆组建内阁——英国政治直播
items.summaryZh: 安迪·伯纳姆组建新内阁，任命多位资深政客担任关键职务。他承诺其执政将成为英国政治的“断路器”时刻。
items.whyImportant: 英国新内阁的组建标志着该国政治方向的重大调整。

items.title: Taiwan reviews Papua New Guinea LNG imports after economic office’s forced closure
items.summary: Taiwan is reviewing liquefied natural gas (LNG) imports from Papua New Guinea after the Pacific nation said it would close Taipei’s unofficial representative office. PNG announced last week that it would immediately shut down the office, with Foreign Minister Justin Tkatchenko saying the move reflected the government’s “unwavering commitment to the one-China policy” ahead of the 50th anniversary of the country’s diplomatic ties with Beijing. Chinese foreign ministry spokesman Lin Jian swiftly...
items.titleZh: 在经济办事处被迫关闭后，台湾审查从巴布亚新几内亚进口的液化天然气
items.summaryZh: 因巴布亚新几内亚关闭台湾驻当地代表处，台湾方面正在审查从该国进口液化天然气的相关事宜。此举反映了地缘政治对贸易关系的直接影响。
items.whyImportant: 地缘政治因素正日益干扰台湾与太平洋岛国的经贸往来。
